query: long exposure light trails night abstract streaks
message: sub:intentional_blur/light_trails — anti_aesthetic — long exposure streaks, chaotic light painting, ICM at night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime long-exposure photograph capturing converging light trails in white, green, and red streaking downward from the top of the frame toward a bright central point above a dark body of water. The light trails reflect as a single elongated golden path on the water's surface. Small distant lights are visible along the dark horizon line.
